description: A client needs to reschedule their booked wedding from a Saturday in June to a Saturday in September.

nodes.task_description: Look up the client's existing booking.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the original booking for the June date.

nodes.task_description: Check availability for the requested new date in September.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the ballroom is available on the new date.

nodes.task_description: Update the booking in the system to the new date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully moves the event to the new date.

nodes.task_description: Generate and send a contract addendum to the client reflecting the date change.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the addendum for signature.
